privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world traffic speed data downloaded directly from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) repository (specifically realTraffic/speed_6005.csv). It requires creating a Graphite dashboard named 'Sensor Quality Analysis' with three precise graph titles: 'Raw vs Median Filter', 'Absolute Anomaly Score', and 'Severe Anomalies Only'. The target metric 'servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1' is mapped correctly from the NAB data. All specified metadata claims, including the dashboard name, graph names, and output paths, match the explicit string checks in the verifier.py scoring logic.
